title: galium viscosum subsp. viscosum
intro: Galium viscosum subsp. viscosum, also known as sticky gallium or sticky bedstraw, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Galium viscosum subsp. viscosum include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
